task_completion.description: Verify that the companies 'TechVantage Solutions' and 'NovaBridge Consulting' were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Companies page or dropdown menus in Snipe-IT. Both 'TechVantage Solutions' and 'NovaBridge Consulting' should be visible in the list of companies.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'NovaBridge - Austin Office' location was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Locations page in Snipe-IT. 'NovaBridge - Austin Office' should be visible in the list of locations.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three users (Rachel Chen, Marcus Webb, Priya Kapoor) were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Users page/table in Snipe-IT. The names Rachel Chen, Marcus Webb, and Priya Kapoor should be visible in the user list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four assets (NB-001, NB-002, NB-003, NB-004) were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the All Assets page/table in Snipe-IT. Asset tags NB-001, NB-002, NB-003, and NB-004 should be visible in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify that NB-001, NB-002, and NB-003 are checked out to the correct users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the All Assets or Deployed Assets table. The 'Checked Out To' column should show Rachel Chen for NB-001, Marcus Webb for NB-002, and Priya Kapoor for NB-003. NB-004 should remain unassigned (Ready to Deploy).

task_completion.description: Verify that the company field for all four assets was updated to 'TechVantage Solutions'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the All Assets page/table. The 'Company' column for assets NB-001, NB-002, NB-003, and NB-004 should explicitly display 'TechVantage Solutions'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Snipe-IT interface, not terminal windows or API clients like Postman.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine Snipe-IT dashboard, forms, and data tables, rather than a text editor or notes application containing the task text.

integrity.description: Verify no extra unintended assets were created.
integrity.visual_evidence: The asset list should only show the newly created assets (NB-001 through NB-004) alongside any pre-existing system assets, without duplicates or mistakenly created collateral assets.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create companies 'TechVantage Solutions' and 'NovaBridge Consulting', location 'NovaBridge - Austin Office', and users Rachel Chen, Marcus Webb, and Priya Kapoor. Four assets (NB-001 to NB-004) must be created with specific serial numbers (NB-SN-40981 to NB-SN-40984). NB-001, NB-002, and NB-003 must be checked out to Rachel, Marcus, and Priya respectively. NB-004 must remain unassigned. Finally, all four assets must have their company updated to 'TechVantage Solutions'. No extra assets should be created.
